title: Realistic Cities
description: Adds roads, city decorations, functional traffic lights, and more!
body:
## Important Notes **Please read before contacting me!** - [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api/) is REQUIRED - [GeckoLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib/) is REQUIRED - [OwOLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/owo-lib/) is REQUIRED - This mod will not be ported to older Minecraft versions. The source code is on Github, so you can feel free to do it yourself. **THE GITHUB REPO IS DOWN DUE TO A LEAK OF MY PRIVATE INFO** ## Info Realistic Cities is a Minecraft mod that adds roads, road decorations like traffic lights, and much more. This mod is updated very frequently, so if you want more suggestions, simply contact me! If you find any bugs or issues, please report them [here](https://github.com/nousername33/realisticcities/issues). To keep up with what I'm doing, check out the [todo list](https://github.com/users/nousername33/projects/1)! ## Forge If this mod gets to 15,000 downloads counting Curseforge by the end of December, I'll make a Forge port. I really do not. ## Help us out! You can translate this mod on [Crowdin](https://crowdin.com/project/realisticcities) and help bring it to more places in the world! ## Suggestions? Issues? Comments? [Github](https://github.com/nousername33)
Discord: the admins of the server we were in have booted us out. For now you can just dm me @ixion396 **Between this and Curseforge, we got 1000 downloads! Thank you!**
